evals.prompt: 帮我搜一下最近 mixture-of-experts 方向有什么新论文
assertions: runs scripts/search.py with a relevant query
presents results as a readable list with links

evals.prompt: 今天有什么值得关注的 AI 新论文?
assertions: includes HF daily papers or arXiv new submissions
summarizes top picks instead of dumping raw JSON

evals.prompt: 查一下 arxiv 1706.03762 这篇论文,有没有代码链接
帮我把博客首页的排版调紧凑一点
assertions: does not run any paper-discovery script

evals.prompt: 把这篇 md 文档翻译成中文存到 content/blog
assertions: does not run any paper-discovery script
